name: Steve Gilmore
abstract: Steve Gilmore is an American jazz double-bassist. He has played in numerous bands and ensembles including The Phil Woods Quintet, which he joined at its inception in 1974.

interviews.title: Steve Gilmore interviewed by Monk Rowe, Delaware Water Gap, PA, November 8, 1999

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Jazz and The American Song

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: We’ve been together thirty five years... Bill Goodwin, Steve Gilmore and I... Bill and Steve and been with me through everything.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Tony Marino
about_quotes.evidence: Steve Gilmore was a big influence on me because he was part of Phil Woods’ group
about_quotes.doc_title: Tony Marino interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 25, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Goodwin
about_quotes.evidence: we were going to have the quintet with Brian Lynch, Phil, and Bill Charlap, Steve Gilmore and myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Goodwin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 28, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: Bill Goodwin, Steve Gilmore and I, we’ve been working together for 26 years now.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods interviewed by Monk Rowe, Delaware Water Gap, PA, November 8, 1999
